race.comment: THOR'S ANGEL (5) bolted in two back as a $1.70 favourite before a 0.2L defeat last time out over 2100m here. She's racing in top order and the inside draw this time around is a big tick. Racing well since stepping up in trip and she can continue her run of recent form. REDRYE (4) won three back before disappointing two back. She returned to form with a narrow defeat last time out and now gets Pike in the saddle. Needs some luck from the draw but she rates highly on her latest effort. GOLD ENIGMA (8) bolted in at York last start and can go on with the job. OPAL TANGO (10) was too good at York last time out over the 1920m. This isn't much tougher and she rates highly on the back of that effort. Can go on with the job.
